# ThankYouDeals.com

> Post-purchase deal platform that helps supermarkets and retailers turn every checkout into a customer retention and revenue opportunity. After a purchase, customers receive an SMS linking to a store-branded page featuring the retailer's weekly deals alongside curated advertiser offers — driving repeat visits for the retailer and qualified, high-intent reach for advertisers.

ThankYouDeals INC operates a B2B platform with two primary audiences:
- **Retailers** (supermarkets and grocery chains) — generate new ad revenue and increase repeat visits without adding work at the register.
- **Advertisers** — reach shoppers in the high-intent post-purchase moment via SMS-delivered branded offers.

The demo experience is live at https://keyfood101-junex-juney.thankyoudeals.com.
Contact: support@thankyoudeals.com.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://www.thankyoudeals.com/): Product overview, value props for retailers and advertisers, how it works, measurable impact, live demo, and contact.

## How the platform works

1. **Customer checks out** at the retailer's register and the POS sends a "Thank you for your purchase" SMS containing a link.
2. **Customer opens a store-branded mobile page** built by ThankYouDeals that highlights the retailer's weekly deals plus complementary advertiser offers curated by ThankYouDeals.
3. **Retailer earns revenue** from advertiser partnerships and gains repeat store visits from customers re-engaged by the deals.

## What ThankYouDeals measures and reports

- **Revenue** earned from advertiser offers per retailer, broken down by campaign.
- **Repeat visits** after customers receive the post-checkout experience.
- **SMS engagement** — open rates, click-throughs, and engagement trends.

## Audience-specific value

**For retailers:** new revenue stream from advertiser-funded offers, higher repeat visit rates, fully branded customer experience, no POS changes required from the retailer.

**For advertisers:** access to a high-intent, just-purchased audience; peak engagement moment immediately after checkout; qualified traffic from shoppers with demonstrated purchasing power.

## Company

- **Legal name:** ThankYouDeals INC
- **Website:** https://www.thankyoudeals.com/
